core.auth.login.title: Sign in
core.auth.login.description: Sign in to your AdAstro account
core.auth.login.heading: Sign in
core.auth.login.subheading: Sign in to access your dashboard and profile
core.auth.login.error.auth: Authentication error occurred. Please try again.
core.auth.login.error.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access the admin area.
core.auth.login.error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
core.auth.login.error.oauthUnavailable: Social sign-in is currently unavailable. Use email and password or enable OAuth in settings.
core.auth.login.invited: Invited user? Use the invite email link to set your password.
core.auth.login.toast.failedDescription: Please verify your credentials and try again.
core.auth.login.toast.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
core.auth.forgot.title: Forgot password
core.auth.forgot.heading: Reset your password
core.auth.forgot.body: Enter your email and we will send a secure reset link.
core.auth.forgot.sendFailed: Unable to send reset link right now.
core.auth.forgot.defaultSuccess: If an account exists, a reset link was sent.
core.auth.reset.title: Set password
core.auth.reset.description: Create or reset your account password
core.auth.reset.heading: Set your password
core.auth.reset.body: Choose a secure password for your account.
core.auth.reset.invalidLink: Your reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
core.auth.reset.signInFirst: Sign in first or request a new password reset link.
core.auth.reset.sessionVerified: Session verified. Set your new password below.
core.auth.reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
core.auth.reset.updateFailedDefault: Unable to update password right now.
core.auth.callback.title: Signing you in
core.auth.callback.heading: Finishing sign in
core.auth.callback.body: We are syncing your session. You will be redirected shortly.
core.auth.callback.missingToken: Missing authentication token. Please try signing in again.
core.auth.callback.unexpectedError: Unable to finish sign in. Please try again.
core.auth.unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
core.auth.unauthorized.description: You do not have access to this area of AdAstro.
core.auth.unauthorized.heading: This hatch is sealed
core.auth.unauthorized.body: Looks like your account does not have clearance for this route. Sign in or head back to the public site.
core.profile.title: Your profile
core.profile.error.passwordTooShort: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
core.page.fallback.heading: Fast publishing with practical defaults
core.page.fallback.description: The homepage system page is missing right now. Create or restore it from the page editor.
core.blog.title: Articles
core.blog.cta.heading: Need help with your build?
core.blog.cta.body: If you are migrating content or tuning for PageSpeed, the contact page is the fastest way to reach support.
core.blog.cta.label: Contact
core.blog.noPosts.title: No posts found
core.blog.noPosts.body: There are no posts to display at the moment.
core.category.label: Category
core.category.overviewBody: Visit our main archive to explore tags, series, and seasonal guides curated by the newsroom.
core.tag.label: Tag
core.tag.suggestBody: Want to see a topic covered? Share an idea with the community and we will add it to the roadmap.
core.author.label: Author
core.search.title: Search
core.search.minChars: Enter at least 2 characters to run a search.
core.search.noResults: No published posts matched your search.
